basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi has released the official notification for 1 Project Nurse - III posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per the Government of India ICMR rules.

salary_details.details: Rs. 28000 Per Month (plus 30% HRA as admissible)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse - III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse - III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Project Nurse - III position at AIIMS Delhi is 07-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Nurse - III post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BSc Nursing degree to be eligible for the Project Nurse - III position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Nurse - III post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India ICMR rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Nurse - III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 28000 Per Month, along with 30% HRA as admissible.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application with required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Nurse - III role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Project Nurse - III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Nurse - III position at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Delhi located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Delhi is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110029.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at AIIMS Delhi.
